chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: This is Realme Buds T500 Pro

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: I found the design of these earbuds to be very premium

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Normal case earbuds are bulky but these are very compact

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: If I show you, then it fits perfectly in my palm

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: I don't even know that there are earbuds in my palm

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: The case is of matte finish or leather type finish

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: So there will be no scratches

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: But the earbuds come with a glossy finish

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Realme calls this color as chocolate color

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: I don't know why it doesn't look like chocolate

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: There are other colors like yellow and silver

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: In these earbuds, you get the same 12.4mm driver

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: It fits very snugly

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: It is quite lightweight too, it is around 4.5 grams

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You get IP55 rating here, so it can handle sweat and light rain

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You get Bluetooth 6.1, Google fast pairing option

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You can connect to the app very easily

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You get triple pairing support

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You can connect to 2 devices at a time or 3 devices at a time

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: It has the in-ear detection feature

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: So if you are listening to something and you take it out of your ears

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Then the play and pause feature works very well

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You get high-res audio codec support

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: It has LSDC 5.0

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: It also has KAC and SBC codec, so it is compatible with Android and iOS devices

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: In these earbuds, you get to listen to a very punchy bass

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: The bass is on a little boosted side

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You can boost the bass even more by going to the app

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: The vocals are very clear, especially if you listen to a Hindi song

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: If you listen to a podcast, the clarity is very good

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Other than that, it has special audio feature

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: If we talk about the call quality, then in these earbuds, you get 6 microphones

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: 3 microphones are present in each earbud

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: It works very well in indoor and outdoor

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: It handles the noise very well

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: These earbuds give you a playback time of around 13 hours on single charge

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: It depends on the mode you have chosen, ANC is on or the volume you are listening to

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: In total, you can get a playback time of more than 50 hours

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You also get fast charging, so if you charge for 10 minutes, you get 10 hours of usage

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: If we talk about the price, then these earbuds are launched under Rs 3000

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: But these earbuds will be available under Rs 3000

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: So in this case, I think these are very valuable earbuds
